ddls:
CREATE TABLE "go_terms" (
  "go_term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GO term */,
  "go_term" TEXT /* GO term identifier (e.g., GO:0051704) */,
  "go_name" TEXT /* Name of the GO term */,
  "go_namespace" TEXT /* Namespace of the GO term (e.g., BP, MF, CC) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the GO term */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the GO term */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Q-value of the GO term */,
  "specificity" TEXT /* Specificity of the GO term */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the GO term */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the GO term */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the GO term was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene (e.g., srlA) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the gene in the dataset */,
  "total_genes" INTEGER /* Total number of genes in the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset the gene belongs to */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the DNA (e.g., +, -) */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* DNA sequence of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the dataset is derived from */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., RNA-seq, microarray) */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for analysis (e.g., DESeq2, edgeR) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "go_gene_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "go_term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GO term */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "evidence_code" TEXT /* Evidence code supporting the relationship */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the evidence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_go_gene_relationships_go_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("go_term_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("go_term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_go_gene_relationships_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "annotation_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation (e.g., function, localization) */,
  "annotation_value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., functional, structural) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)
